rulings.Case Title: ALLISON LESHEFSKY VS. RENKA PROP, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens; Memorandum In Support Thereof; Declarations Of Anna Kihagi In Support Thereof;
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 20, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANTs RENKA PROP, LLC and ANNE SWAIN's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1010.6. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: NATALYA SHUVALOVA ET AL VS. LARISA VOLOSKOVA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Violation Of The Court Order As To The Site Inspection Of 1825 Wawona St. San Francisco, Ca And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 20, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFFs NATALYA SHUVALOVA and ELIZAVETA SHUVALOVA's Motion For Violation Of The Court Order As To The Site Inspection Of 1825 Wawona St. San Francisco, Ca And Request For Monetary Sanctions transferred to department 301 to be heard on May 31, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: KENNETH CHIU VS. MANUEL OBANDO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Enforce Stipulation Per Ccp 664.6; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 20, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF KENNETH CHIU's MOTION To Enforce Stipulation Per Ccp 664.6 Hearing Required to address the current condition of the unit. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SOO MING LAI VS. MARIA NGUYEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 20, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT MARIA NGUYEN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Hearing Required to address why this action should not be consolidated with the Quiet Title action or abate pending the resolution of the Quiet Title action. The issue of title that is being raised by the parties across multiple actions are not susceptible to the resolution with the unlawful detainer case. = (501/CFH)
